use_codes.desc: NASAL ADMINISTRATION OF DIAZEPAM FOR TREATMENT OF INTERMITTENT, STEREOTYPIC EPISODES OF FREQUENT SEIZURE ACTIVITY IN PATIENTS 6 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
VALTOCO® is indicated for the acute treatment of intermittent, stereotypic episodes of frequent
seizure activity (i.e., seizure clusters, acute repetitive seizures) that are distinct from a patient’s
usual seizure pattern in patients with epilepsy 6 years of age and older.
